mapper.insert: INSERT INTO seat (session_id, row_no, col_no, type, area_id, seat_name, pair_seat_id, status, create_time) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{rowNo}, #{colNo}, #{type}, #{areaId}, #{seatName}, #{pairSeatId}, #{status}, #{createTime})

INSERT INTO seat (session_id, row_no, col_no, type, area_id, seat_name, pair_seat_id, status, create_time) VALUES
(#{seat.sessionId}, #{seat.rowNo}, #{seat.colNo}, #{seat.type}, #{seat.areaId}, #{seat.seatName}, #{seat.pairSeatId}, #{seat.status}, #{seat.createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, row_no, col_no, type, area_id, seat_name, pair_seat_id, status, create_time FROM seat WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, session_id, row_no, col_no, type, area_id, seat_name, pair_seat_id, status, create_time FROM seat WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY row_no ASC, col_no ASC

SELECT id, session_id, row_no, col_no, type, area_id, seat_name, pair_seat_id, status, create_time FROM seat WHERE id IN
#{id}
